name: canshare-tnm-gist-pt
title: NZ AJCC gastrointestinal stromal tumour pathological T category
description: A pathological tumour stage (pT) of a gastrointestional stromal tumour (GIST) before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (latest edition).
